description:
Offered: may be less than once every two years
This course continues from Music Theory and Analysis I, covering further work in modulation, chromaticism and figured bass, as well as chord extensions and the introduction of non-Western scale sets. In depth study of voice leading in the chorale style is undertaken, while multiple genres including classical, jazz and pop/rock are examined.
Prerequisite(s): MUSC 2240 or permission of instructor.
Meets General Education Requirement(s): AIA, FA, IHIP, PL
